Class VaultAwsProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.aws.VaultAwsProperties
All Implemented Interfaces:
VaultSecretBackendDescriptor
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.vault.aws") public class VaultAwsProperties extends Object implements VaultSecretBackendDescriptor
Configuration properties for Vault using the AWS integration.
Author:
Mark Paluch, Kris Iyer

      public String getBackend()
      Description copied from interface: VaultSecretBackendDescriptor
      Backend path without leading/trailing slashes.

      Returns:
      the backend path such as secret or mysql.
